creator: nxjoseph@protonmail.com
text:
Created attachment 254575
multimedia/py-syncedlyrics.patch

syncedlyrics is a Python tool that retrieves synchronized lyrics in LRC format
for music tracks. It offers a command-line interface to search for lyrics, with
options to filter by plain or synced formats and specify providers.
This utility enhances the music experience by providing time-synced
lyrics for karaoke or personal use.

WWW:    https://github.com/moehmeni/syncedlyrics

Thanks in advance.
